approved_command_preview: Run the DCOIR Review hybrid direct update with LF source writes, existing unanchored reason wording preserved, and a source-scoped diff check. This uses chatgpt-exec, not apply-in. On success it commits and pushes the hybrid ranking/fix-synthesis source update to main. On failure it records a diagnostic summary, restores dirty source/staging files, and exits so readable artifacts and final readback are published.
